holdings.infoBox: BBH is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amgen stock at 14.48%, Gilead Sciences at 13.04%, Vertex Pharmaceuticals at 8.13%, argenx SE at 6.39%, and Regeneron Pharmaceuticals at 5.98%.

overview.description: The VanEck Biotech ETF (BBH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS US Listed Biotech 25 index, a market-cap-weighted index of the 25 largest biotech firms globally. BBH was launched on Dec 20, 2011 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.
